lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in fair condition with noticeable wear and minor issues but is functional and drivable.

2020 sedan in mint condition. The exterior is clean with no visible scratches, dents, or wear. The interior is equally well-maintained with no signs of significant use. Mechanically the car is in excellent shape with no known issues or upcoming repairs needed.

This vehicle is being offered in good condition at $33,500 — a solid used car that has been consistently maintained and is ready for its next owner. The exterior presents well overall, with only minor surface scratches and light wear consistent with everyday driving; there are no significant dents or structural damage. The interior is clean and functional, with normal wear on the seats and controls but no tears, major stains, or broken components. Mechanically, the car runs reliably — the engine starts smoothly, transmission shifts without issue, and all major systems including brakes, cooling, and electrical are in proper working order. This is a dependable vehicle for a buyer looking for honest, everyday transportation without paying mint-condition prices.

This vehicle is being offered in poor condition — best suited for buyers who are mechanically inclined, looking for a project car, or need basic transportation on a very tight budget. The exterior shows significant wear, including multiple scratches, dents, and paint fading or peeling in several areas. The interior is worn throughout, with damaged upholstery, cracked or broken trim pieces, and general deterioration consistent with heavy use over many years. Mechanically, the car has known issues and will likely require meaningful repairs to bring it to a fully reliable state — buyers should budget for additional work beyond the purchase price. This is an as-is sale, and we strongly encourage a pre-purchase inspection so you know exactly what you're taking on. That said, at this price point, it represents an honest opportunity for the right buyer.

This car is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues that will require substantial repair work before it can be reliably driven. The exterior shows noticeable damage including dents and scratches. This vehicle is best suited for someone willing to invest time and money into repairs, or for parts.

🚗 A Practical, No-Nonsense Daily Driver — Honestly Priced! This vehicle is in fair condition — it starts reliably, drives as expected, and will get you where you need to go without drama. We'll be upfront with you: it shows its age with some cosmetic wear and minor imperfections, so don't expect showroom shine. But if you're looking for dependable transportation at a price that makes sense, this could be exactly what you need. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This exceptional vehicle is a rare find in today's market — presented in truly mint condition with meticulous care evident in every detail. The paint retains a deep, flawless luster, the interior is immaculate with zero wear on surfaces, seats, or trim, and all mechanical systems perform with the precision you'd expect from a vehicle treated as a prized possession. Full service history available. Whether you're a discerning enthusiast or simply demand the best, this is the one to beat. Come see it in person — it won't disappoint.

Hey there, car lovers! 🚗✨ I am SO excited to share this absolute gem with you today. This beauty is truly in mint condition — we're talking a car that turns heads every single time it rolls down the street. She's been lovingly cared for, kept clean inside and out, and drives like a dream. Every time I've taken her out, I've gotten compliments from strangers in parking lots — that's just the kind of car she is! The interior is spotless, the exterior gleams, and mechanically she's as solid as they come. I genuinely hate to see her go, but she deserves an owner who'll enjoy her as much as I have. If you're looking for a car you can be proud of — one that feels special every single drive — this is the one. Come take her for a spin and I promise you'll feel it too. Serious inquiries welcome, and I'm always happy to chat! 😊

Presenting a meticulously maintained example that exemplifies what a properly sorted daily driver should be. This unit features a tight, rattle-free chassis with responsive steering feel and a powertrain that pulls cleanly through the entire RPM band — no hesitation, no smoke, no drama. The transmission cycles through gears with factory-spec precision, clutch engagement is crisp, and the suspension geometry remains dialed-in with zero perceptible play in the bushings or ball joints. Exterior panels sit flush with consistent panel gaps throughout, and the paint retains its factory depth with only the most superficial micro-marring visible under direct lighting. Interior surfaces show minimal wear consistent with careful ownership — no cracked dash, no worn bolsters, no delaminating headliner. Service history reflects a conscientious ownership profile. This is a driver's car kept in driver's condition. Serious inquiries only — priced to move for the right buyer who knows what they're looking at.
Mint condition. Turns heads, drives perfect. Zero issues. Priced to sell fast — don't sleep on this.

Meet a car that doesn't just turn heads — it stops traffic. This beauty carries itself with the quiet confidence of a vehicle that's been cherished, not merely owned. Slide into the driver's seat and you're greeted by an interior that feels like a first day, every day — surfaces that catch the light just right, stitching that tells a story of careful stewardship. Under the hood, she's eager and responsive, ready to remind you why you fell in love with driving in the first place. Whether you're carving through canyon roads at golden hour or gliding through city streets on a Tuesday morning, this is the kind of car that makes the journey feel like the destination. Opportunities like this don't linger — cars with this kind of presence and care behind them find their next keeper quickly.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of turn-key perfection. Presenting in flawless condition inside and out, every surface, stitch, and system reflects meticulous care from day one. The paint retains a showroom-quality depth, the interior is spotless and fully functional, and the mechanicals have been fastidiously maintained — service records available upon request. Drive it home with complete confidence: this is the rare used car that truly lives up to its billing. Priced to move for a discerning buyer who recognizes genuine quality.
